name: codex-cage
description: Run Codex in an isolated Docker workspace and publish verified PRs from issue links.

scripts.qa:image: docker build --build-arg CODEX_CLI_VERSION=0.125.0 -t codex-cage/base:local docker/base && docker run --rm codex-cage/base:local sh -lc 'test "$(id -un)" = agent && node --version && npm --version && git --version && gh --version && codex --version && curl --version >/dev/null && jq --version && ssh -V'
